app.name: ArchiSteamFarm
app.one_liner: C# application with primary purpose of farming Steam cards from multiple accounts simultaneously.

screens.name: Main Dashboard
screens.purpose: Display status and control of all configured bots/accounts for card farming.

rust_commands.name: addlicense
rust_commands.purpose: Parse and add license links for games to farm.

rust_commands.name: owns
rust_commands.purpose: Check ownership of games via parsed links.

rust_commands.name: play
rust_commands.purpose: Set custom game name while farming (deprecated due to Steam changes).

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement basic Steam idle interaction
acceptance_tests: Bot states are accurately reflected in main dashboard.
Custom game play functionality is disabled when Steam API breaks it.
System correctly parses game links in addlicense and owns commands.
